'''鈭歽-d-sh''' ('''kayadash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:penelopise|penelopise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:penelopise|penelopise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-d-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kayadash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyadash|thiyadash]] || [[word:jiyadash|jiyadash]] || [[word:shiyadash|shiyadash]] || [[word:kiyadash|kiyadash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyadash|thuthuyadash]] || [[word:jujuyadash|jujuyadash]] || [[word:shushuyadash|shushuyadash]] || [[word:kukuyadash|kukuyadash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyadash|thuyadash]] || [[word:juyadash|juyadash]] || [[word:shuyadash|shuyadash]] || [[word:kuyadash|kuyadash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyadash|thuyadash]] || [[word:juyadash|juyadash]] || [[word:shuyadash|shuyadash]] || [[word:kuyadash|kuyadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyadash|theyadash]] || [[word:jeyadash|jeyadash]] || [[word:sheyadash|sheyadash]] || [[word:keyadash|keyadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyadash|thothoyadash]] || [[word:jojoyadash|jojoyadash]] || [[word:shoshoyadash|shoshoyadash]] || [[word:kokoyadash|kokoyadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyadash|thoyadash]] || [[word:joyadash|joyadash]] || [[word:shoyadash|shoyadash]] || [[word:koyadash|koyadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyadash|thoyadash]] || [[word:joyadash|joyadash]] || [[word:shoyadash|shoyadash]] || [[word:koyadash|koyadash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]] || [[word:yadash|yadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yadash|th忙yadash]] || [[word:j忙yadash|j忙yadash]] || [[word:sh忙yadash|sh忙yadash]] || [[word:k忙yadash|k忙yadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayadash|thathayadash]] || [[word:jajayadash|jajayadash]] || [[word:shashayadash|shashayadash]] || [[word:kakayadash|kakayadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayadash|thayadash]] || [[word:jayadash|jayadash]] || [[word:shayadash|shayadash]] || [[word:kayadash|kayadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayadash|thayadash]] || [[word:jayadash|jayadash]] || [[word:shayadash|shayadash]] || [[word:kayadash|kayadash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayadash|shayadash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayadash|goshayadash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayadash|gokishayadash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayadashn眉|shayadashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayadashnkn眉|goshayadashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadashn眉|gokishayadashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayadashsh毛|shayadashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayadashnksh毛|goshayadashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayadashsh毛|gokishayadashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadashro|shayadashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadashnkro|goshayadashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadashro|gokishayadashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadashmu|shayadashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadashnkmu|goshayadashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadashmu|gokishayadashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayadashsher|shayadashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayadashnksher|goshayadashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayadashsher|gokishayadashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayadashng|shayadashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayadashnkng|goshayadashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayadashng|gokishayadashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayadashya|shayadashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayadashnkya|goshayadashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayadashya|gokishayadashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayadashyam|shayadashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayadashnkyam|goshayadashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayadashyam|gokishayadashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadashn眉sh毛|shayadashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadashnkn眉sh毛|goshayadashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadashn眉sh毛|gokishayadashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadashn眉ro|shayadashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadashnkn眉ro|goshayadashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadashn眉ro|gokishayadashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadashn眉mu|shayadashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadashnkn眉mu|goshayadashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadashn眉mu|gokishayadashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadashsh毛n眉|shayadashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadashnksh毛n眉|goshayadashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadashsh毛n眉|gokishayadashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadashsh毛ro|shayadashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadashnksh毛ro|goshayadashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadashsh毛ro|gokishayadashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadashsh毛mu|shayadashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadashnksh毛mu|goshayadashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadashsh毛mu|gokishayadashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadashron眉|shayadashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadashnkron眉|goshayadashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadashron眉|gokishayadashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadashrosh毛|shayadashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadashnkrosh毛|goshayadashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadashrosh毛|gokishayadashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadashromu|shayadashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadashnkromu|goshayadashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadashromu|gokishayadashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadashmun眉|shayadashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadashnkmun眉|goshayadashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadashmun眉|gokishayadashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadashmush毛|shayadashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadashnkmush毛|goshayadashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadashmush毛|gokishayadashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadashmuro|shayadashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadashnkmuro|goshayadashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadashmuro|gokishayadashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
